title: Input Reading, Tokenization, Command Registry, and Dispatch · Runtime Contract: Pokedex Go Dispatch Evidence
summary: The loop assumes every read succeeds, splits arguments inconsistently, indexes missing tokens, hard-codes a growing switch, and cannot test dispatch without real stdin and stdout. Predict the user decision, Go ownership, command state, API contract, resource budget, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex go dispatch evidence increment in deterministic command parser and injected dispatcher. Learners progress through pre…
